T0523.title: Object-Level Authorization
T0523.definition: A server-side authorization check that verifies whether the caller is allowed to access a specific object or resource instance.
T0523.description: Object-Level Authorization is used to identify related risks, abuse patterns, control requirements, and operational signals in BREAK business-security analysis.
T0523.usageExample: Assess Object-Level Authorization related exposure and define the corresponding controls.
